ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'archived') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "cv_type" TEXT /* Type of cross-validation used */,
  "r2" REAL /* R-squared value */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the evaluation */,
  "train_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset used */,
  "test_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test dataset used */,
  "train_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time taken to evaluate the model on the test set */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_cv_type FOREIGN KEY ("cv_type") REFERENCES cv_types ("cv_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'suspended') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cv_types" (
  "cv_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-validation type */,
  "cv_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cross-validation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cross-validation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cv_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
